'''dhamuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetogenesis|chaetogenesis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetogenesis|chaetogenesis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhamuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæmihith|dhæmihith]] || [[word:dhæmihij|dhæmihij]] || [[word:dhæmihish|dhæmihish]] || [[word:dhæmihi|dhæmihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhamumuhuth|dhamumuhuth]] || [[word:dhamumuhuj|dhamumuhuj]] || [[word:dhamumuhush|dhamumuhush]] || [[word:dhamumuhu|dhamumuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhamuhuth|dhamuhuth]] || [[word:dhamuhuj|dhamuhuj]] || [[word:dhamuhush|dhamuhush]] || [[word:dhamuhu|dhamuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhamufhuth|dhamufhuth]] || [[word:dhamufhuj|dhamufhuj]] || [[word:dhamufhush|dhamufhush]] || [[word:dhamufhuf|dhamufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhamuhuthu|dhamuhuthu]] || [[word:dhamuhuju|dhamuhuju]] || [[word:dhamuhushu|dhamuhushu]] || [[word:dhamuhuku|dhamuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhamuhuth|dhamuhuth]] || [[word:dhamuhuj|dhamuhuj]] || [[word:dhamuhush|dhamuhush]] || [[word:dhamuhu|dhamuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhamuhuthul|dhamuhuthul]] || [[word:dhamuhujul|dhamuhujul]] || [[word:dhamuhushul|dhamuhushul]] || [[word:dhamuhukul|dhamuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhamuhuthuthu|dhamuhuthuthu]] || [[word:dhamuhujuju|dhamuhujuju]] || [[word:dhamuhushushu|dhamuhushushu]] || [[word:dhamuhuku|dhamuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhamuhuthun|dhamuhuthun]] || [[word:dhamuhujun|dhamuhujun]] || [[word:dhamuhushun|dhamuhushun]] || [[word:dhamuhukun|dhamuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhamuhuthuoro|dhamuhuthuoro]] || [[word:dhamuhujuoro|dhamuhujuoro]] || [[word:dhamuhushuoro|dhamuhushuoro]] || [[word:dhamuhukuoro|dhamuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
